## pvectl status

Show a quick Proxmox cluster health summary

```
pvectl status [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help    help for status
  -w, --watch   refresh the status output every 2 seconds until interrupted (Ctrl-C)
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --debug     log Proxmox API request/response activity to stderr
      --verbose   show Proxmox task IDs (UPIDs) alongside action output
```
